title: Decision entry (PRD §3.3)
description: One ADR-style record in decisions/entries/. Truth anchor: the team. Append-mostly: status transitions never rewrite context/decision/consequences. Drafted with provisional date-suffixed ids (D-YYYY-MM-DD-slug); the steward assigns the final D-NNN at acceptance (§3.5). Chain resolution and acyclicity are structural-validator checks (KK-05). Schema evolution is additive-only (§3.5, D-013).

id.description: Final D-NNN (immutable once published) or provisional date-suffixed draft id (§3.5).

status.description: Lifecycle: proposed → accepted → addressed → archived (+ rejected, superseded).

context.description: Append-mostly: transitions never rewrite recorded reasoning.

supersedes.description: Chains must resolve and be acyclic (structural validator).

relates-to.description: Sideways typed refs to concepts and leaves; never embedded content across store lines (PRD §3).

storeFile.description: Decision entries-file envelope. Every store file carries schema-version (§3.5); evolution is additive-only.
